question: What canary percentage is used at release start?

retrieved.title: Model Operations Standard
retrieved.text:
# Model Operations Standard

Default local planner model is **phi3.5:3.8b**.

Reviewer model is **functiongemma:270m**.

Prompt-response cache TTL is **18 hours**.

Every answer must cite at least one source filename used during retrieval.

retrieved.title: Release Control Policy
retrieved.text:
# Release Control Policy

Release train window is **Tuesday 16:00 UTC**.

Each deployment starts with a canary on **8% of traffic**.

Promotion to 100% is allowed after **45 minutes** if error rate remains below **0.6%**.

Promotion is paused if any S0/S1 incident is active.

retrieved.title: Incident Triage Guide
retrieved.text:
# Incident Triage Guide

Primary on-call paging is handled by **Solar Pager**.

Incident severities:
- **S0** full production outage
- **S1** critical customer-impacting degradation
- **S2** moderate degradation with workaround
- **S3** low-impact issue

For API incidents, emergency rollback is mandatory when **p95 latency exceeds 1200 ms for 10 consecutive minutes**.

retrieved.title: Support Operations Handbook
retrieved.text:
# Support Operations Handbook

Enterprise first-response SLA is **20 minutes**.

Urgent escalation channel is **#support-escalation**.

A draft root-cause memo is due within **72 hours** for customer-visible incidents.

question: Where should urgent support escalations be posted?

retrieved.title: Support Operations Handbook
retrieved.text:
# Support Operations Handbook

Enterprise first-response SLA is **20 minutes**.

Urgent escalation channel is **#support-escalation**.

A draft root-cause memo is due within **72 hours** for customer-visible incidents.

retrieved.title: Data Governance Notes
retrieved.text:
# Data Governance Notes

Raw event logs are retained for **400 days**.

PII uses envelope encryption with policy alias **vault-river**.

Full logical backups run every **Sunday 02:30 UTC** and are retained for 30 days.

question: How long are raw event logs retained?

retrieved.title: Data Governance Notes
retrieved.text:
# Data Governance Notes

Raw event logs are retained for **400 days**.

PII uses envelope encryption with policy alias **vault-river**.

Full logical backups run every **Sunday 02:30 UTC** and are retained for 30 days.
